task_name: Apache Error Log - Generate Error Summary Report
notes: Excellent work. The report comprehensively addresses all requirements: file created in correct location; accurate date range (Jun 9-16, 2005) and level breakdown (753 errors/247 notices); server config issues clearly isolated and explained with mod_jk JNI factory failures and scoreboard race conditions; client errors properly separated with 630 entries from 159 IPs and detailed category breakdown; security assessment identifies specific threats (AWStats RCE scanner, Code Red/Nimda traversal, FrontPage probes, Sumthin worm) with concrete evidence; three actionable recommendations addressing mod_jk configuration, DirectoryIndex, and mod_security hardening. Markdown formatting is professional and well-structured.
